title: MikroTik CubeG-5ac60aypair, Wireless Wire Cube Pro
description: Wireless Wire Cube Pro is a complete PTP connection with robust and easy-to-position brackets, very decent dimensions, L4 licenses, 11 ° antenna ( 60 GHz), Gigabit Ethernet with support for both passive and active PoE and is suitable for point-to-point installations in the 60 GHz band working with 802.11ad/ay standards with real throughput up to 1 Gbps Full Duplex at a distance of up to 2400 m. The units also have a 5GHz radio part with the 802.11a/n/ac protocol as a backup for possible… 802.11ad/ay (60 GHz) + 802.11a/n/ac (5 GHz) support CPU: IPQ-4019 (716 MHz), 4 cores 256 MB RAM 64 MB flash storage Gigabit LAN with PoE support (18 .. 57V DC, 802.af/at) L4 license TDMA GPS Sync Maximum EIRP: 40 dBm (2) L4 licensed device (2) Power adapter 24 V / 0.8 A (2) Gigabit POE injector (2) Holder (2) Metal cable tie
